name: The Luminous Index
blurb: A luminous atlas-library of routes, readings, shelfmarks, and public GitHub-Issue stars, with explicit private/local versus public/permanent boundaries.
features: Living Atlas with local seeker movement, route sketches, atlas currents, and nearby encounters
Public constellation of permanent GitHub Issue world-marks
Private readings tray, local draft composer, shelfmark copy trail, and boundary labels
Six luminous regions: Atrium, Weather Loom, Memory Orchard, Mirror Lab, Signal Reef, and Quiet Moon

landmark.concept: A floating luminous index-card stack wrapped by thin atlas-route ribbons, with cyan-violet-gold shelfmark glyphs and a small reading-tray glow at its base.
geometryHints: stacked translucent rectangular slabs like oversized index cards
curved line ribbons suggesting private atlas routes
small public-star pinpoints around the landmark, visually distinct from private route ribbons
hover plaque explaining that entering opens The Luminous Index

interaction.label: Enter The Luminous Index
interaction.boundaryNote: Public marks are permanent GitHub Issues; readings, shelfmarks, routes, nearby encounters, and atlas-current rides remain private/local unless a visitor deliberately submits a GitHub Issue.
